query:
-- 2. Projects with send_ready contacts breakdown by priority
SELECT 
  p.priority,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) as total_projects,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN p.id END) as projects_with_send_ready,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.digestSafe = 1 THEN p.id END) as digest_safe_projects,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as total_send_ready_contacts,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN c.id END) as unique_send_ready_contacts
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.projectId = p.id
WHERE p.status = 'active'
GROUP BY p.priority
ORDER BY FIELD(p.priority, 'hot', 'warm', 'cold', 'unknown');
